ocr_prompt: Please perform a high-fidelity OCR extraction on the attached document(s). Extract all text exactly as it appears, preserving the layout and structure where possible. If there are tables, represent them in Markdown format. If multiple files are provided, clearly separate the extraction for each file with a heading and the filename. Do not provide any introductory or concluding remarks, just the extracted text content.
analysis_prompt: Please analyze the attached document(s) and provide a detailed summary of its contents, key points, and any specific data found. If multiple files are provided, combine the analysis to highlight connections between them while still detailing each file's specific content.
